title: Capital Stack Calculator
userProblem: Show who gets paid first, who is exposed first, and whether the stack is funding the deal or hiding a hole.
formulaNotes: Total cost = purchase price + closing costs + capex. Total sources = debt + preferred equity + common equity + VTB. Funding gap = total cost - total sources.

uiCopy.headline: Show who gets paid first, who is exposed first, and whether the stack is funding the deal or hiding a hole.

title: Waterfall Structure Calculator
userProblem: Make the promote visible. Investors should see how much of the upside goes to capital versus sponsor.
